---
title: "Updates for July, 2024"
---

There have been some updates on Payments object and transaction requests. Please check the updates below.

* Wallet Cryptogram
* Simplified mode for refunds

### Wallet Cryptogram

We've added a new field to the Payment method object while [creating the Payment](/reference/create-payment) called `cryptogram`. It is a field that lets you use your [Apple/Google pay native](/docs/apple-pay-direct-integration) integration and make payments directly vía API. You will also find the fingerprint in the payment response when a transaction is made.

*Example*

```json
"payment_method": {
    "detail": {
      "wallet": {
        "cryptogram": "{\"data\":\"e2Nz1Y2ADnyZ1JQsvYEhv0n24DEOqRN8DRqeSfGCtz5WyT5YNLb\\/fFaShhsqzIa5PuO0QM3zwty6tCXX4Vb3\\/s5oF0pkC1MGhacojT7kRkwfoo01hH75ucmnxZ8BeyJ1ryh86cQEPKYcdIzpq0y6p1f\\/hOt44Wi6plGRjyMKk+WuAOYqS4i\\/Vhsl6KPwcUEbwI47kWVb3Xy9L6sU0kClxFj3o+w1SDiqQ0c3H0Yf4Fg2AnzVvK+LvZMCpcy5U60HhkwtvtKqYNB4nINpE+iGv\\/xOVxVE\\/vKtgLDFKn0zC24HrRMpYOY2U7F0m4n3W1+6iA5VUF+jmBqVUtv6Q\\/2lRqkuoZDOMq2yIPyM0HGc0VGeFpLpd6dGYVerE0KRHot\\/ERT+S0qaYhtd5Ob1EtLnolmfqa49fP09LYSg+mpnN9MG\",\"signature\":\"\\/S5LMEUGCCsGAQUFBwEBBDkwNzA1BggrBgEFBQcwAYYpaHR0cDovL29jc3AuYXBwbGUuY29tL29jc3AwNC1hcHBsZWFpY2EzMDIwggEdBgNVHSAEggEUMIIBEDCCAQwGCSqGSIb3Y2QFATCB\\\\\\/JJxE+T5O8n5sT2KGw\\/orv9LkswDwYDVR0TAQH\\/BAUwAwEB\\/zAfBgNVHSMEGDAWgBS7sN6hWDOImqSKmd6+veuv2sskqzA3BgNVHR8EMDAuMCygKqAohiZodHRwOi8vY3JsLmFwcGxlLmNvbS9hcHBsZXJvb3RjYWczLmNybDAOBgNVHQ8BAf8EBAMCAQYwEAYKKoZIhvdjZAYCDgQCBQAwCgYIKoZIzj0EAwIDZwAwZAIwOs9yg1EWmbGG+zXDVspiv\\/QX7dkPdU2ijr7xnIFeQreJ+Jj3m1mfmNVBDY+d6cL+AjAyLdVEIbCjBXdsXfM4O5Bn\\/Rd8LCFtlk\\\\/fGMAoGCCqGSM49BAMCBEYwRAIgWZqIeQGG+vU+DKnaq5FlbI\\/hvSc0CB4P9KjD+RGUDm0CIGe7\\/84VmiUaMpuiu4fngAYz7nuC3arZV5jy0NVPzvRZAAAAAAAA\",\"header\":{\"publicKeyHash\":\"YK8kdoBXLGqBQKBtCZOl0DQTUHOWidRCxgOgf\\/1gBMM=\",\"ephemeralPublicKey\":\"MFkwEwYHKoZIzj0CAQYIKoZIzj0DAQcDQgAEzvJDjQ1bAF6ICjz9ThNDw9hz+1iuiTfy2qypHwKX3kmKOWQ2fjDl4d5SLHc6ahKCw92qh2sg1DLYvnaWc2h9Og==\",\"transactionId\":\"a760ee6c5ed60231976ea3393987f223660b0b70c3419558305d2fcbb379adf3\"},\"version\":\"EC_v1\"}"
      }
    },
    "type": "APPLE_PAY"
  },
```

### Simplified mode for refunds

Yuno allows merchants to retry capture and refund transactions that received an error or declined response from the provider by adding a field to the transaction request. This feature is designed to enhance transaction success rates and improve user experience. By setting the simplified\_mode field to true in capture and refund requests, the system will:

* Return a `SUCCEEDED` status for capture transactions so you dont have to worry about the retry scheme and Yuno will automatically retry failed or pending transactions up to five times within a 24-hour period.
* Return the `DECLINED` status for the transaction, leaving the payment in a `PENDING`/`RETRY_IN_PROCESS` status, and Yuno will automatically retry failed or pending transactions up to five times within a 24-hour period.

*Example*

```json
{
  "simplified_mode": true,
  "reason": "REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER",
  "merchant_reference": "AA01"
}
```

For more information, please refer to the [Transaction retries](/docs/transaction-retries) section in Guides.

### Taxes

For a better handling of the taxes information for every payment, in Yuno we have added a `Taxes` array of objects inside the `additional_data. order` struct so the merchants can send more than one Tax line for each case.

If you are sending the Tax object outside the additional\_data struct, don't worry, we are going to keep supporting the object, but for a better management of taxes we recommend to start using the new array of objects available instead.

For more information on how it works, please refer to the [Payment amount details](/docs/payment-amount-details#taxes) on the Guides section.
